name: Beef Eater Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. From a 6-ounce package of onion and garlic croutons, set aside 1 cup.
2. In a small bowl, add hot water and 1 egg to the remainder of the package. Stir to combine.
3. Press the crouton mixture into a greased 9-inch pie pan.
4. Combine ground beef, cheese, barbecue sauce, egg, onion, and croutons in a separate bowl.
5. Press the filling into the crust.
6. Place tomato slices on top.
7. Bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 25 to 30 minutes.
8. Top with additional cheese and bake for 2 more minutes.
9. Serve with a salad.
